label: Mid-2010s America
description: Smartphone era fully arrived. Crossovers replacing sedans and SUVs. LED everything. Retail apocalypse beginning. Blockbuster gone.
people_mix: a young couple pushing a jogging stroller
a dog walker with three dogs
a courier carrying an insulated food delivery bag
a man in skinny jeans taking a selfie
a woman in yoga pants carrying a green smoothie

specific_models: 2012-2017 Toyota Camry — sharper creased mid-size sedan
2015-2020 Ford Edge — mid-size crossover, bold grille
2015-2023 Ford F-150 — aluminum body, blocky modern
2013-2018 Hyundai Santa Fe — fluidic sculpture styling
2011-2017 Jeep Grand Cherokee — refined upscale SUV
2007-2017 Jeep Wrangler — boxy off-roader, round headlights
visual_characteristics: sharp character lines on body panels
blacked-out trim and chrome accents mixed

specific_models: 2015-2020 Ford F-150 — aluminum body, C-clamp headlights

fuel.context: Prices dropped sharply from 2014 due to oil oversupply, crossovers replacing large SUVs

characteristics: renovated or vacant big box stores
large modern canopies with LED lighting
pay-at-pump with color screens and ads
full color digital price signs at gas stations
signage.typography_style: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos

characteristics: variable message signs on highways common
green highway signs with Highway Gothic font

items: modern metal trash and recycling receptacles
modern bus shelters with digital displays in cities

characteristics: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments
transformer boxes on poles and ground level
cellular antennas on rooftops and towers

advertising.style: digital photography, social media influenced, clean minimal layouts

characteristics: bioswales and rain gardens in new developments

lighting.street_lights: LED conversions widespread — bright white light replacing orange sodium
lighting.commercial: LED lighting standard inside and out
lighting.signs: full color LED digital displays, LED channel letters

photography.style: sharp digital, vivid colors, smartphone HDR aesthetic, social media ready

downtown_street.narrative: A 2015 main street mid-revival — the video store replaced by a phone repair shop, third-wave coffee and a vape shop, smartphones in every hand.
storefronts: the old video store space now a phone repair shop with an 'iPHONE & TABLET REPAIR' LED sign
the same diner, retro-styled, with 'COFFEE $2.25' chalked on a menu board
barber shop with its spinning barber pole, now billed as a 'classic barbershop'
third-wave coffee shop with a minimalist logo and Edison bulbs visible inside
vape shop with a bright 'VAPE — E-CIGS' LED window sign
yoga studio with frosted glass and a lowercase sans-serif logo
craft beer taproom with a hand-drawn chalkboard sidewalk sign
boutique with a reclaimed-wood facade and minimalist lettering
people_activities: several people looking down at smartphones as they walk
a bearded man in a slim plaid shirt photographing his coffee
a woman in yoga pants carrying a rolled mat
a couple taking a selfie in front of the painted mural
a cyclist with a messenger bag riding in the bike lane
a dog leashed outside the coffee shop, its owner visible inside
sidewalk diners at small cafe tables under string lights
a barista delivering drinks to an outdoor table
a man in a henley checking a fitness band
extras: the old ghost-sign wall repainted as a colorful mural
a bike corral at the curb
string lights zigzagging over the sidewalk seating
chalkboard sandwich-board signs outside the cafes
a modern bike-share style rack
a food truck parked mid-block
a dog water bowl outside a cafe door

gas_station.narrative: A 2015 station — LED-lit canopy, digital price sign, video ads playing on every pump screen, and a big convenience store.
storefronts: modern canopy with white LED lighting
full-color digital price sign on the road pole
pumps with color screens playing ads
large convenience store with fresh-coffee branding in the windows
red DVD-rental kiosk outside the store entrance
air and vacuum island at the lot edge
ice merchandiser by the door
people_activities: a driver self-serving at the pump
a customer watching the pump screen ads while fueling
a woman scrolling her smartphone while leaning on her crossover
a man returning a disc at the DVD kiosk
a clerk stacking windshield-washer fluid by the door
a driver vacuuming his car at the vacuum island
extras: card-skimmer warning stickers on the pumps
combined trash-and-squeegee stations between the pumps
a chalkboard A-frame sign advertising the coffee bar
a red DVD-rental kiosk by the store entrance
an ice merchandiser and propane cage along the wall
an air-and-vacuum island at the lot edge

strip_mall.narrative: A 2015 strip mall in the retail apocalypse — vacant units between a vape shop, a dollar store, and a low-cost gym.
storefronts: former video store unit now a vape shop with an LED 'VAPE' sign
dollar store anchor with bright green-and-yellow signage
phone repair store with a 'WE FIX PHONES' sign
24-hour budget gym in a former retail unit with purple-and-yellow branding
Mexican taqueria with a hand-painted mural sign
nail salon with a neon 'OPEN' LED sign
thrift store with donation bins outside
two vacant storefronts with 'FOR LEASE' banners and papered-over glass
people_activities: a shopper scrolling a phone under the canopy
a gym-goer with a duffel bag heading to the gym
a family loading dollar-store bags into a crossover
a man vaping outside the vape shop
a woman carrying takeout containers to her car
a delivery driver carrying packages to a storefront
extras: a mostly empty cart corral
a 'NOW LEASING' banner on the facade
cracked, patched parking lot with faded stripes
a chalkboard A-frame sidewalk sign
string lights over an outdoor seating nook
a food truck parked at the lot edge

default.narrative: An ordinary 2015 American commercial street — LED signs, crossovers at the curb, smartphones out everywhere.
storefronts: local diner with 'COFFEE $2.25' on a chalkboard menu
barber shop with a spinning barber pole
phone repair shop in a former video store space
third-wave coffee shop with a minimalist logo
vape shop with an LED window sign
yoga studio with frosted glass
